cases.title: MFA Push Notifications Not Received
cases.description: Duo MFA push notifications stopped arriving on iPhone. Approve request never shows up when logging into VPN portal.

cases.title: Ransomware Detected on File Server
cases.description: Security incident: EDR alert on file server FS-PROD-03 — ransomware behavior detected, files being encrypted on finance share.

cases.title: DNS Resolution Failing Internal Apps
cases.description: Internal apps cannot resolve hostnames on corp.local domain. nslookup times out from all VLANs since DNS server patch.

cases.title: SQL Server TempDB Full
cases.description: SQL Server alert tempdb data file full on PROD-SQL-01. All queries failing with insufficient space in tempdb.

cases.title: Teams Status Stuck on Away
cases.description: Microsoft Teams presence stuck on Away even when actively working. Calendar integration and status reset did not help.

cases.title: Monitor Stand Broken Adjustment Knob
cases.description: Dell monitor arm adjustment knob snapped — monitor tilts down and cannot stay in position. Need replacement stand or arm.

cases.title: Compromised Service Account Login
cases.description: Security incident: SIEM detected successful login for svc-backup account from unknown IP at 2am. Account should be disabled.

cases.title: Firewall Blocking Vendor SFTP
cases.description: Perimeter firewall blocking inbound SFTP from approved vendor IP 203.0.113.50. Need rule added for nightly file exchange.

cases.title: Disable User Leaving Company Friday
cases.description: Employee last day Friday — need AD account disabled, mailbox converted to shared, and all system access revoked per offboarding SOP.

cases.title: Chrome Browser Extensions Disabled
cases.description: All Chrome extensions disabled by new GPO. Need approved password manager extension whitelisted for engineering team.
